welcome.title: CulinaryExpert
welcome.tagline: Smart Prep for a Healthy Life
welcome.description: Your AI-powered culinary companion for zero-waste meal planning, precise nutrition targeting, and effortless batch cooking.
welcome.loginHint: Already have an account? Sign in from Profile

unitSelection.title: Choose your units
unitSelection.subtitle: You can change this later in Settings.

disclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer
disclaimer.subtitle: Please read and accept before continuing
disclaimer.p1: CulinaryExpert is a fitness and lifestyle application designed to help you plan nutritious meals and track your health metrics.
disclaimer.p2: The information, calculations, and recommendations provided by this application are for informational and educational purposes only and do NOT constitute medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
disclaimer.p3: Always seek the advice of a qualified healthcare provider before making any significant changes to your diet, exercise routine, or health management plan.
disclaimer.p4: If you have or suspect you may have a medical condition such as diabetes, heart disease, or eating disorders, consult a licensed physician or registered dietitian before using this application.
disclaimer.p5: The calorie, macro, and body composition calculations are estimates based on population averages and may not be accurate for your individual physiology.
disclaimer.checkboxLabel: I have read and understood the Medical Disclaimer

biologicalData.title: Biological data
biologicalData.subtitle: Used to calculate your BMR and body composition.

measurements.title: Tape measurements
measurements.subtitle: Used for body fat calculation via the US Navy Formula.
measurements.sideNote: Measure one side only — values apply to both sides.

healthScore.title: Your Health Score
healthScore.subtitle: Calculated from your biological data and lifestyle.
healthScore.description: Your personalised 7-day meal plan has been generated based on your data.

profile.title: Profile
profile.privacyP1: CulinaryExpert collects only the data you provide during onboarding (biological metrics, lifestyle preferences) and anonymous usage analytics.
profile.privacyP2: Your data is stored securely and is never sold to third parties. It is used solely to generate personalised meal plans and nutrition recommendations.
profile.privacyP3: You may delete your account and all associated data at any time by contacting support.
profile.privacyP4: We use industry-standard encryption for data in transit and at rest.
profile.termsP1: By using CulinaryExpert you agree to use it for personal, non-commercial purposes only.
profile.termsP2: The app provides nutritional guidance based on scientifically validated formulas. Results are estimates and do not replace professional medical or dietetic advice.
profile.termsP3: You are responsible for ensuring the accuracy of the data you enter. Incorrect measurements will affect the quality of recommendations.
profile.termsP4: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the app constitutes acceptance of any changes.
profile.signOutMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?

mealPlan.title: 7-Day Meal Plan
mealPlan.noMealPlanDesc: Generate your personalised 7-day meal plan based on your nutrition goals, preferences, and cooking time.
mealPlan.regenerateMessage: This will create a new 7-day plan based on your feedback. Continue?
mealPlan.noPlanToday: No meals planned for this day.
mealPlan.generationError: Could not generate meal plan. Please check your connection.
